rationale: Annotate every `assert forall` with the same triggers the ensures use (`post1_self_.get_*(_)` / `post2_self_.get_*(_)`), so each ensures-forall is instantiated at matching keys on both runs. Then case-split on the target thread/endpoint to derive full `==` between post1 and post2 at every accessor (including the target's queue@ via Seq extensionality), and conclude `r1 == r2` for unit.
